codebot.codeGeneration.fragmentGeneratio: When you press Enter, AI automatically generates the smallest block of code for you (In some cases, code generation is suppressed and no code is generated).
codebot.codeGeneration.singleLineGenerat: When you code (excluding enter), AI automatically generates this line of code for you (In some cases, code generation is suppressed and no code is generated).
codebot.codeGeneration.completeFragmentG: Generate the code block which retains complete structure when pressing enter.
codebot.codeGeneration.autoTriggerTimeDe: Set the debounce delay (75–1,000 ms) for generating code after typing pauses.

codebot.configuration.keepContext.descri: Manually referenced context will be retained after sending and automatically included in the next question for smoother follow-up.nding a question, the context of the manual reference is retained, and it will be automatically included in the next question, making it convenient to continue asking questions.

codebot.agent.enableCheckpoints.descript: Enables extension to save checkpoints of workspace throughout the task. Uses git under the hood which may not work well with large workspaces.
